source_name: Code4rena Ethena Labs Findings and Analysis Report (2024-11) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_claim: The addBlacklistAddress and addWhitelistAddress functions do not check whether the user has opposite role
why_it_looked_bad: The addBlacklistAddress function does not check whether the user has WHITELISTED_ROLE
why_not_valid: dual whitelist/blacklist role assignment is an admin hygiene issue unless it creates a demonstrated value-moving bypass
downgrade_reason: dual whitelist/blacklist role assignment is an admin hygiene issue unless it creates a demonstrated value-moving bypass
trust_assumption: Treat as a caution/false-positive reference unless the current target shows permissionless reachability, direct value loss, and concrete affected code path.
when_it_could_be_real: if combined with permissionless access or large-value state transitions
if the affected path becomes critical to mint/redeem/withdrawal solvency or availability
